response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack and D-language developer with broad web/mobile experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems work. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015, and there is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, formal technical lead experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers, or production cloud architecture at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, courses, and dojos
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (only ~6 months of C/C++ experience)
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed systems leadership
No formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
